steps.t: Atli Spider-bane can be found just north of Cal Sprigley. Cal Sprigley suggested that you speak with Atli Spider-bane about the spiders at his farm an…
The entrance to the cave the hunters blocked off lies in the ruins due east of Archet. Atli told you that he sent his cousin Bali to check the caves, …
The missing pages of Bali's journal must be somewhere within the caves. The spiders may have taken the missing pages and webbed them into their cocoon…
Atli Spider-bane can be found at the north end of Archet. Atli Spider-bane will want to know what you discovered among the pages of Bali's journal.
